mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_ROLE (ROLE_CODE, ROLE_NAME, ROLE_STATUS, IS_DELETE) VALUES (#{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{roleStatus}, #{isDelete})
mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_ID, ROLE_CODE, ROLE_NAME, ROLE_STATUS, IS_DELETE FROM SYS_ROLE WHERE ROLE_CODE = #{roleCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT r.ROLE_CODE FROM SYS_ROLE r INNER JOIN SYS_USER_ROLE ur ON ur.ROLE_ID = r.ROLE_ID WHERE ur.USER_ID = #{userId} AND r.ROLE_STATUS = 1
